title: Crypto.com launches IRA product combining stocks and crypto
message_html: Crypto.com launches IRA product combining stocks and crypto ...
snippet: The rollout follows an August 2025 executive order directing regulators to revisit prior guidance that had discouraged crypto in 401(k) plans.
